summary: audited the corpus against the structure, format, lifecycle, suite and combat-log contracts, loading each governance rather than working from memory; ran the corpus structure engine instead of hand-auditing

located the project spec with the discovery engine after first hand-globbing for it; discovery confirmed one spec and surfaced a finding the hand pass missed, that the project name was resolved by folder basename because none was declared

derived the two behavioral nodes' missing sections against the frozen suites; both maps verified one-to-one against their suite independently of the producer, no scenario unmapped and no row naming a scenario that does not exist

one scenario map landed textually complete but unparseable to the lint, which recognizes a row only when the scenario cell is backtick-wrapped; a title-set comparison called it green while every row was invisible to the check. Caught by running the suite check rather than trusting the comparison, and repaired before the gate
